description: Environmental Review — manages NEPA/CEQA/SEPA compliance, wetland delineation, stormwater management, and endangered species consultation for development permits

hard_stops.label: Environmental Impact Statement Required
hard_stops.logic: Project triggers mandatory EIS/EIR threshold and no environmental impact statement has been filed — cannot proceed without environmental clearance

hard_stops.label: Wetlands Permit Not Obtained
hard_stops.logic: Project impacts jurisdictional wetlands and no Section 404 permit has been obtained from Army Corps of Engineers

hard_stops.label: Endangered Species Consultation Required
hard_stops.logic: Project area contains critical habitat for listed endangered/threatened species — Section 7 consultation with USFWS required before proceeding

soft_flags.label: Phase I ESA Recommended
soft_flags.logic: Site history indicates potential environmental contamination — Phase I Environmental Site Assessment recommended before grading

soft_flags.label: Stormwater Permit Threshold
soft_flags.logic: Disturbed area exceeds 1 acre — NPDES Construction General Permit (CGP) likely required
